footer.madeBy: Email Builder · Built with react-email by Camilo Muñoz.

landing.heroSubtitle: A visual block builder with live preview. Create, customize and export your email templates in minutes.
landing.howSubtitle: From zero to your email in four steps: build it block by block and see it in real time, with no rigid templates and no code.
landing.ctaHeading: Ready to create your first email?
landing.ctaSubtitle: No account needed. Get started right now.
landing.documentTitle: Email Builder · Design emails by blocks, no code

features.title: Block builder
features.description: Add and reorder header, text, image, button, columns and more with drag and drop.

features.title: Live preview
features.description: What you see is exactly the email that gets sent, on desktop and mobile.

features.title: Export to HTML and text
features.description: Download your template ready for your favorite email provider.

features.title: No sign-up
features.description: Start instantly; each visitor sees only their own templates.

steps.title: Add and order blocks
steps.description: Drag header, text, image, button, columns, cards and more onto the canvas, and reorder them as you like.

steps.title: Customize the theme
steps.description: Set colors, typography and spacing once; they apply consistently across the whole email.

steps.title: Preview live
steps.description: See the real result on desktop and mobile while you edit, with no surprises when sending.

steps.title: Export and send
steps.description: Download HTML, plain text or a React component ready for your email provider.

dashboard.heading: My templates
dashboard.subtitle: Design and export emails by blocks.

examples.heading: Start from an example
examples.subtitle: Professional templates by industry. Make a copy and customize it.

ecommerce-oferta.name: E-commerce sale
ecommerce-oferta.description: Discount campaign with a featured product and a call to action.

saas-bienvenida.name: SaaS welcome
saas-bienvenida.description: Welcome onboarding with first steps and access to the dashboard.

newsletter-medios.name: Editorial newsletter
newsletter-medios.description: Weekly digest with top headlines and links to articles.

restaurante-carta.name: Restaurant booking
restaurante-carta.description: New seasonal menu with a dish photo and table booking.

salud-cita.name: Appointment reminder
salud-cita.description: Medical appointment reminder with details and confirmation.

evento-invitacion.name: Event invitation
evento-invitacion.description: Invitation with date, venue and RSVP confirmation.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Can't reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.validationFailed: Some fields are invalid. Please review the form.
errors.templateNotFound: Template not found (it may have been deleted).
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.mailSendFailed: Couldn't send the email. Check the sender or verify your domain with the provider.

editor.notFound: We couldn't find this template. It may have been deleted.

theme.noBrandKits: You haven't saved any brand kits yet.
theme.darkModeHint: Applies on clients with dark mode (prefers-color-scheme).

header.label: Header
header.description: Logo, title and subtitle at the top of the email.

image.label: Image
image.description: A responsive image, optionally linking somewhere.

card.label: Card
card.description: A bordered card with a title, text and an optional button.

divider.label: Divider
divider.description: A horizontal rule that separates sections.

columns.label: Columns
columns.description: Two or three side-by-side text columns.

social.label: Social
social.description: A row of links to your social networks.

footer.label: Footer
footer.description: Company information and an unsubscribe link.

inspector.heading: Block
inspector.selectPrompt: Select a block to edit its properties.
inspector.imageError: Couldn't load the image. Check the URL.
inspector.title: Title
inspector.subtitle: Subtitle

variables.heading: Variables
variables.hint: Insert {{token}} in your text; the preview replaces it with the sample value.
variables.label: Label

issues.imageMissingAlt: An image has no alternative text (alt).
issues.noUnsubscribeLink: The footer is missing an unsubscribe link.
issues.tooManyLinks: Too many links; some filters penalize this.
issues.spamWords: The text contains common spam words.
issues.shoutingText: There is ALL-CAPS text or too many exclamation marks.
issues.thinTextContent: There is very little text compared to the visual content.
issues.undefinedVariables: You use variables that are not defined.

dashboard.newDesc: Start from scratch with a fresh template ready to edit.
dashboard.examplesDesc: Pick an industry example, make a copy and tweak it to your needs.
dashboard.languageDesc: Switch between Spanish and English anytime.

editor.paletteDesc: Drag or click to add blocks. Theme and Variables live here too.
editor.canvasDesc: Reorder and select blocks to edit them in the inspector on the right.
editor.previewDesc: See the real email on desktop or mobile while you edit.
editor.historyDesc: Revert changes with these buttons or Ctrl/Cmd+Z.
editor.exportDesc: Download the email as HTML, text or a React component (with a pre-check).
editor.sendDesc: Email it to yourself to see it in your inbox.
editor.saveDesc: Your changes autosave, but you can also save manually here.
